propositions: The plan-review sidecar's _slim step drops pass-1 evidence and scenarios fields, losing a finding's grounding quotes.
The resolved block_threshold and blocking_enabled a finding was judged against are discarded after pass-3, so auditors cannot see the applied decision boundary.
Introduce schema version plan_review_result_v2 that persists per-finding evidence, scenarios, block_threshold, and blocking_enabled.
The decide functions should expose the resolved threshold and blocking flag on each finding's decision output instead of dropping the ThresholdResolver result.
latest_review_result must read both v1 and v2 sidecars, treating missing threshold/evidence in v1 as not recorded.
Existing fields and all-buckets pooling remain unchanged, with no backfill and reversible rollback to v1.
